story.title: Build a full customer portal with authentication, billing, admin dashboard, notifications, analytics, profile management, and reporting
story.user_story: As a customer, I want to authenticate and access the full customer portal so that I can manage my account and view reports.
acceptance_criteria: Given a valid login attempt, when the user reaches the authentication page, then they are redirected to the dashboard with their profile information displayed.
Given an invalid login attempt, when the user is redirected back to the login page, then they see an error message indicating failed login and are prompted to try again or reset their password.
Given a successful logout, when the user navigates away from the portal, then they are redirected to the login page.

be: Implement JWT-based authentication for API sessions
Create backend endpoints for login, logout, token refresh, and OAuth callback
fe: Design and implement a login page with Google OAuth integration
Store tokens securely in the frontend and handle token expiration logic
qa: Validate successful login, failed login, expired token, and logout behavior

definition_of_done: Unit tests cover token handling and callback validation
Integration tests cover the full login callback flow
clarification_questions: Is there a specific backend architecture for JWT-based authentication?
What is the expected behavior when Google OAuth fails to map an email to an existing user?
assumptions: The frontend will use React or Angular as the main framework
Google OAuth integration requires server-side code exchange of provider code

story_splits.title: Foundation and access
story_splits.user_story: As a stakeholder, I want the foundation and access part of build a full customer portal with authentication, billing, admin dashboard, notifications, analytics, profile management, and reporting. so that the team can deliver it incrementally.
acceptance_criteria: Given foundation and access is prioritized, when implementation starts, then scope is limited to that slice.
Given the slice is reviewed, when acceptance criteria are checked, then BE, FE, and QA impacts are clear.
Given the slice is complete, when QA validates it, then it can be accepted independently.

be: Implement backend support for foundation and access
fe: Implement UI support for foundation and access
qa: Validate foundation and access acceptance criteria

definition_of_done: BE, FE, and QA tasks are complete.
